name: EquipmentShare.com Inc
summary: EquipmentShare.com Inc is a vertically integrated construction equipment rental and technology platform founded in 2014. It operates 352 full-service branches, 9 dealership sites, and 24 building materials retail stores across 45 U.S. states. Core offerings include equipment rentals, new and used equipment sales, parts and services, and the proprietary T3 cloud-based telematics platform. The T3 platform provides real-time fleet tracking, predictive maintenance, and jobsite management. The Company also operates the OWN Program, leasing equipment from third-party owners.
